products.name: Carbon Fiber Quadcopter Kits
products.descriptor: Carbon fiber structural kits for building quadcopter drone frames

products.name: Tangent Tube Mount™
products.descriptor: Carbon fiber bracket for attaching round tubes to flat surfaces or structures

evidence.snippet: The **Tangent Tube Mount™** makes it easy to attach a carbon fiber tube to a plate or other flat surface. The curved portion of the mount is bonded to a carbon fiber tube, and the flat side is bonded/bolted to the plate.

products.name: D-Tube Neck Beam™
products.descriptor: Carbon fiber D-profile structural beam used as a neck beam in composite assemblies

unresolved_questions: All 15 prioritized products were located and submitted. Evidence is primarily from the homepage category navigation (resource-0001) and three category-level pages, since 486 of 492 crawled URLs were skipped. Individual SKU-level detail pages for most products (Roll Wrapped Tubes, Streamlined Airfoil Tubing, Camera Rails, Braided tubes, EconomyPlate™, Carbon/Kevlar Hybrid Sheets, Honeycomb Core, D-Tube Neck Beam™) were not fetched, so SKU counts and detailed specs are unknown.
No NDAA Section 848/889 or Blue UAS claims were found in any fetched page. Vendor is ISO 9001:2015 certified and emphasizes US manufacture, but no product-level compliance designations were stated.

The Carbon Fiber Quadcopter Kits category links to a dedicated page (/carbon-fiber-quadcopter-kits-page) that was not fetched — specific kit configurations and whether they constitute full airframe kits or just hardware sets is unconfirmed.

fetch_requests.reason: Dedicated quadcopter kits category page would confirm whether products are complete airframe kits or structural hardware sets, and enumerate individual SKUs.
fetch_requests.source_hint: linked from resource-0001 line 28 as nav item /carbon-fiber-quadcopter-kits

fetch_requests.reason: D-Tube Neck Beam™ product page would confirm descriptor, SKU variants, and pricing to verify production readiness.
Airfoil tubing product page would provide SKU detail, dimensions, and confirm production status.
